content.en:
"Let's see if we can find the weaker gray bear!"

Ye Tian felt that if he could find the weaker gray and white giant bear and copy the other party's body, he could also break into the territory of this gray and white giant bear and obtain that treasure.

Otherwise, he can't help it!

He then began to look for the area for the sights of the weak gray and white bears.

After continuous attempts, he really found a gray and white giant bear that was comparable to eight blood transformation realms.

Ye Tian didn't dare to kill this weak gray-white giant bear, otherwise it would be easy to be discovered.

Therefore, he first copied the body of the gray and white giant bear, and then instantly made a move to wipe out the gray and white giant bear, and completely turned into nothingness.

Then, Ye Tian pretended to fight with his gray and white giant bear.

Sure enough.

The gray-white giant bear that was comparable to the bone transformation realm killed him instantly in one blow in the air, but he didn't realize that the identity of the weak gray-white giant bear had changed.

"The plan succeeded!"

Ye Tian then approached the territory of the Gray and White Giant Bear as a copy of the Gray and White Giant Bear, looking for the treasure that could upgrade the copy talent.

......

Grey and White Bear Territory.

Ye Tian successfully entered here, kept getting closer to the treasure, and was not attacked.

He didn't go straight there, but walked haphazardly, as if he were wandering around.

Finally, he was very close to the treasure.

At this time, he finally saw the appearance of the treasure.

It was a flower on a blood-colored vine, and there was only one.

"I wonder if that gray bear will stop me from picking?

Ye Tian walked over and tried to pick the flower.

Click!

The flowers were plucked by him and were not stopped.

Obviously, the gray and white giant bear that was comparable to the bone transformation realm didn't care about this flower.

Subsequently.

He walked wildly, out of here, and walked farther and farther.

......

"It worked!"

Ye Tian took the flower from the gray and white giant bear, and then quickly left the area, so as not to be killed.

After getting away from here, he swallowed the flower in one gulp.

Rumble!!!!

A majestic energy poured into the copy talent, helping the copy talent to level up.

The long-lost pain hit, but Ye Tian could easily endure it.

Time passed slowly, and after a long time, the upgrade was completed.

"Copying Talent Upgrade Successful!"

Ye Tian immediately examined the changes in the copying talent.

He tried to copy the body and found that the number of copies increased by one.

Moreover, he found that his ability to copy all things has been greatly improved, he couldn't copy many treasure resources before, but now he can copy treasures of this level in the Blood Transformation Realm.

Of course, if it's just a copy, if it's used to improve cultivation, then it definitely won't work.

But if you copy some treasures and use them for enlightenment, it's not a big problem.

In addition to this, the range covered by the copy talent is also dozens of times larger.

Of course, the biggest change in the copy talent is the addition of an ability - the copy mark!

Copying the imprint is to copy the primeval technique or body into a sigil, he can put this imprint on someone else, and once the imprint is activated, it will turn into the primeval technique or his own copy body.

In other words, he can leave the copy body mark in the Terran, even if his copy body is not there, as long as the Terran urges the copy mark, his copy body will appear there instantly, thus solving the crisis.

Of course, he can also leave the copy body mark on his son Ye Xingchen, and in the future, Ye Xingchen will break into some dangerous places, and if he is in a desperate situation, he can also urge the copy mark.

"That's a pretty good new ability!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he was going to get a few copy sigils.

Currently, he can form three replica imprints.

He left one copy mark on his daughter, one on his wife, and the other on his son.

The daughter has been with the Terrans in the Wanlong Territorial Sea for a long time and doesn't like to go out, so staying on her body is no different from staying in the Terran territory.

......

Taixuanhai.

This is the new primeval treasure land of the Terrans, and the previous Jianchen Sea was seriously damaged, so the Terrans moved here.

At this time.

Ye Tian informed Ye Xingchen and asked him to come back immediately.

Not long after, Ye Xingchen came back.

"Father!"

Ye Xingchen said respectfully.

At this time, Ye Tian used the copy body to copy his copy body into a copy mark.

Airplanes!

This copy mark hit Ye Xingchen's arm.

"Xingchen, if you are in desperate danger, urge the mark on your arm. As for the usual, don't rush the sigil, understand?"

Ye Tian admonished.

"Father, I know!" Ye Xingchen responded.

"Okay, you can go casually in the future, but don't go to places that are too dangerous!" Ye Tian advised.

"Yes, Father!"

Ye Xingchen was overjoyed.

After that, he went to the outside world to experience.

After that, Ye Tian also gave the other two seals to his wife and daughter, and they were all used up.

this day.

Ye Tian made a new discovery in the ruins of the Dragon Sea.

"That's ......"

Ye Tian saw a golden monkey, and with a stick, he easily killed a creature comparable to the Nine Blood Transformation Realm of the primeval level.

And the other party also noticed Ye Tian's existence, and shuttled in an instant.

Rumble!

With a stick, Ye Tian was instantly killed.

However, at this moment, he saw the other party's talent and saw an ancestor he had never seen before.

【Ancient Ancestral Endowment: Golden Light】

Ye Tian naturally copied the moment his body was killed, and copied this primeval-level ancestral endowment into his hand.

......

"It's the first time I've encountered an ancient-level ancestral endowment, and the golden monkey just now is an ancient-level golden monkey, with an ancient-level ancestral endowment, and the strength is afraid that it surpasses the ordinary bone transformation realm!"

Ye Tian guessed.

However, this primeval-level ancestor is now his!

"Fusion!"

Ye Tian fused the golden light of this primeval-level ancestral endowment that he copied into his first primeval-level ancestral endowment.

This is also because he has just upgraded his copying talent, otherwise there is really no way to copy this primeval-level ancestral endowment.

Rumble!!!!

The primeval-grade ancestral golden light gradually merged with Ye Tian.

And this fusion process is also extremely painful, and after a long time, the real perfect fusion is successful.

Then, he took a look at his talent, and sure enough, there was an additional primordial-level ancestor.

"The primeval-grade ancestral endowment may help me quickly practice the corresponding primeval technique!"

Ye Tian guessed.

He was going to test it, find out the primeval technique that matched the golden light of the primeval level, and then try to cultivate the primeval technique without the help of the primeval golden blood to see if he could practice it.
